source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that adds the score32 exp-LUT measured-wrapper promotion audit hook.

requested_items.objective: Audit whether the score32 exp-LUT measured-command-control reduced-replica result is backed by the merged measured dual-stream wrapper PPA.

expected_result.reason: The result should report whether the L2 selected wrapper metrics match the merged L1 wrapper PPA and whether partitioned/cluster physical validation is still required.
